background: Identify which of these statements are true and which are false.

task.query: Correlation coefficient r quantifies the relationship between quantitative variables X and Y.
Correlation coefficient r quantifies the linear relation between quantitative variables X and Y.
The closer 7 is to 1, the stronger the linear relation between X and Y.
The closer r is to —1 or 1, the stronger the linear relation between X and Y.
If r is close to zero, X and Y are unrelated.
If r is close to zero, X and Y are not related in a linear way.
The value of r changes when the units of measure are changed.
The value of 6 changes when the units of measure are changed.
